first_run.rationale: The score remained identical at 8/10. The changes in the justification, strengths, and concerns represent minor rephrasing and a shift in focus that is consistent with normal run-to-run variation. For example, one concern about specific programming languages was swapped for a concern about high-availability systems, both of which are plausible inferences from the original resume text. These changes are not logically connected to the change from one set of generic-sounding company names to another.
